detectors.description:
Reentrancy in BinanceTradingFees._transfer(address,address,uint256) (BinanceTradingFees.sol#645-769):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (BinanceTradingFees.sol#709)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (BinanceTradingFees.sol#783-795)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (BinanceTradingFees.sol#715)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(tfrAmt) (BinanceTradingFees.sol#805)
		- _developmentAddress.transfer(amount.sub(tfrAmt)) (BinanceTradingFees.sol#807)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (BinanceTradingFees.sol#767)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (BinanceTradingFees.sol#933)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (BinanceTradingFees.sol#913)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (BinanceTradingFees.sol#915)
	BinanceTradingFees._rOwned (BinanceTradingFees.sol#321) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- BinanceTradingFees._takeTeam(uint256) (BinanceTradingFees.sol#927-935)
	- BinanceTradingFees._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (BinanceTradingFees.sol#887-923)
	- BinanceTradingFees.balanceOf(address) (BinanceTradingFees.sol#471-475)
	- BinanceTradingFees.constructor() (BinanceTradingFees.sol#405-435)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (BinanceTradingFees.sol#767)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (BinanceTradingFees.sol#941)
	BinanceTradingFees._rTotal (BinanceTradingFees.sol#333) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- BinanceTradingFees._getCurrentSupply() (BinanceTradingFees.sol#1083-1093)
	- BinanceTradingFees._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (BinanceTradingFees.sol#939-945)
	- BinanceTradingFees.constructor() (BinanceTradingFees.sol#405-435)
	- BinanceTradingFees.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (BinanceTradingFees.sol#567-589)

	- [BinanceTradingFees._takeTeam(uint256)](BinanceTradingFees.sol#L927-L935)

	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](BinanceTradingFees.sol#L767)
		- [_rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee)](BinanceTradingFees.sol#L941)
	[BinanceTradingFees._rTotal](BinanceTradingFees.sol#L333) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [BinanceTradingFees._getCurrentSupply()](BinanceTradingFees.sol#L1083-L1093)
	- [BinanceTradingFees._reflectFee(uint256,uint256)](BinanceTradingFees.sol#L939-L945)
	- [BinanceTradingFees.constructor()](BinanceTradingFees.sol#L405-L435)
